title: Daisy SMP
body:
Daisy SMP Modpack

✿ This is a modpack for the Daisy SMP! ✿

![Daisy SMP Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7af681f28933ddc48633b5000651ae093ef748cb.png) This is a modpack for a application only server, you can apply any time you want [here](https://daisydc.macuguita.com), this is mainly a server for building! There's not a very big PvP community in here. But we do have a lot of player-made gorgeous builds you can join and make new friends in! --- ## Focus of the modpack This modpack is mainly focused around building, and make it it easier be it through various magic mods that allow you to make resource gathering less *annoying*, since it is focused around building it also has lots of furniture mods like [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted), [Yet another furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/yet-another-furniture) and more! --- ## Exclusive mechanics ### These are only some of the features if you want to know more check out this mod page! [Daisy SMP Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/daisy-smp-tweaks) **Randomly generated chat questions** There's prizes!
--- ## Requirements to join the server * Play on Minecraft **JAVA** * Use **THIS** modpack * Be **above 16** years of age * Have a working microphone, able to speak in-game --- ## Support If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, feel free to: - Open a ticket in the discord server. - You are free to use this modpack for other servers, as long as you properly credit this modpack by providing a link in your discord/other community. --- ## Credits - Developer: macuguita
